name: My work illness has pre-existing stuff—will they pay less in Salt Lake City?

mainEntity.name: My work illness has pre-existing stuff—will they pay less in Salt Lake City?

acceptedAnswer.description: Possibly apportioned; employer pays only work-aggravated portion.[4][5] Idaho/Utah apportion based on pre-existing hindrance.[4] Key factors: (1) baseline impairment proof; (2) work contribution %; (3) ISIF for severe pre-existing. Demand full eval. Negotiate no-apportion. Legal fight maximizes.
